buildCommand: npx drizzle-kit push; npx vite build && npx esbuild server/boot.ts --platform=node --bundle --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=dist/server-bundle.js --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module';const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" && cp dist/public/index.html dist/public/404.html
